'''maruzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacher|vacher]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacher|vacher]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| maruzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mærizith|mærizith]] || [[word:mærizij|mærizij]] || [[word:mærizish|mærizish]] || [[word:mærizi|mærizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:maruruzuth|maruruzuth]] || [[word:maruruzuj|maruruzuj]] || [[word:maruruzush|maruruzush]] || [[word:maruruzu|maruruzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:maruzuth|maruzuth]] || [[word:maruzuj|maruzuj]] || [[word:maruzush|maruzush]] || [[word:maruzu|maruzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:marufzuth|marufzuth]] || [[word:marufzuj|marufzuj]] || [[word:marufzush|marufzush]] || [[word:marufzuf|marufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maruzuthu|maruzuthu]] || [[word:maruzuju|maruzuju]] || [[word:maruzushu|maruzushu]] || [[word:maruzuku|maruzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maruzuth|maruzuth]] || [[word:maruzuj|maruzuj]] || [[word:maruzush|maruzush]] || [[word:maruzu|maruzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maruzuthul|maruzuthul]] || [[word:maruzujul|maruzujul]] || [[word:maruzushul|maruzushul]] || [[word:maruzukul|maruzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maruzuthuthu|maruzuthuthu]] || [[word:maruzujuju|maruzujuju]] || [[word:maruzushushu|maruzushushu]] || [[word:maruzuku|maruzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maruzuthun|maruzuthun]] || [[word:maruzujun|maruzujun]] || [[word:maruzushun|maruzushun]] || [[word:maruzukun|maruzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maruzuthuoro|maruzuthuoro]] || [[word:maruzujuoro|maruzujuoro]] || [[word:maruzushuoro|maruzushuoro]] || [[word:maruzukuoro|maruzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
